content:
The GenAI talent hunt is on! 🚀
🚀 Bangalore, we're coming!
An exclusive invitation-only GenAI Hiring Drive is on Friday, 3rd July for shortlisted candidates. Please register yourself on given link or scan given QR.

https://lnkd.in/gUyZTF3u

If you're building with LLMs, RAG, Agents, and Enterprise AI, keep an eye out. 👀
#GenAI #Hiring #Bangalore #LLM #RAG
Kumar Amitesh SinghDr Vikram S.Jyotsna WaryaAnil BajpaiAnil AsnaniRupesh Chandra
comment: In GenAI hiring drives, differentiating demo-builders from production-ready folks comes down to evaluation discipline, cost/latency tradeoffs, and RAG data governance.
